decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28. The GitHub client house style and the listIssues rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: listIssues fetches /repos/{owner}/{name}/issues and includes the page query parameter (page 2 requests page=2), returning the parsed issues.
The change modifies only src/github.ts and adds no new dependency.

weighted.criterion: The call goes through this.request(...) so it inherits the Authorization header and the !res.ok error handling, rather than calling fetch() directly.
It does not duplicate the base URL, the auth header, or the JSON parsing that request() already provides.
Signature and style match getUser and getRepo.
